pi_items.source: Web search for 'Eagle Eye SAR Unit CAMEO' returned no public records. The name combines real operational terminology (Eagle Eye technology exists, SAR units are real) but this specific resource name is synthetic/created for the task.

pi_items.verified_value: UAS Team (custom resource type, not standard)
pi_items.source: Web search of CAMEO Data Manager documentation and features. 'UAS Team' is not a standard CAMEO resource type. The task explicitly requires the agent to ADD this as a custom picklist entry. It is a synthetic type created for this task.

Verification via web search and RFC documentation. The 555 exchange, specifically 555-0100 through 555-0199, is officially reserved for fictional use in North America per US telecommunications standards. This number is documented as synthetic/fictional in the fictitious telephone number Wikipedia article and ClearlyIP documentation.

Web search for 'Cincinnati zip code 45245' verified this is a real zip code in Cincinnati, Ohio (Eastgate area, Clermont County). Population ~20,249, primarily residential with medical facilities and various businesses.

Path structure verified consistent with CAMEO database storage patterns found in official CAMEO documentation and environment setup scripts. The path references 'CAMEOfm' (older version name) but is the expected location for the database file on Windows systems with CAMEO Data Manager installed.

pi_items.verified_value: Address not found in public records
pi_items.source: Web search for '4000 Gateway Blvd Cincinnati Ohio 45245' and '4000 Gateway Cincinnati Ohio' returned no matches for this specific address. Other Gateway-named properties in Cincinnati exist (Gateway Plaza at 400 W 9th St, Gateway Lodge at 4453 Reading Rd) but not this specific address.
Web search verified CAMEO Data Manager 4.5.1 is a real EPA/NOAA software release. Version 4.5.0 and 4.5.1 were released in 2025. The install script in the environment references version 4.5.1.

pi_items.metadata_value: CAMEO Data Manager is EPA software
pi_items.verified_value: Confirmed - EPA and NOAA developed application
pi_items.source: Web search of EPA official website (https://www.epa.gov/cameo/cameo-data-manager-software) confirms CAMEO Data Manager is an official EPA/NOAA application for emergency response and chemical inventory management.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses CAMEO Data Manager 4.5.1, a real EPA/NOAA application for emergency response planning. The task requires agents to register a synthetic resource named 'Eagle Eye SAR Unit' with a fictional phone number (513-555-0199, which uses the officially-reserved 555-01xx range for fictional numbers) and a real Cincinnati zip code (45245). The street address (4000 Gateway Blvd) does not appear in public records but the zip code is genuine. The resource type 'UAS Team' is a custom type that agents must first add to the system picklists. All metadata values have been verified as either real application/data or intentionally synthetic for the task scenario.
